description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 7. Reflection robustness and retry ladder**.

Goal: add a bounded retry ladder for bad reflection results, using stricter prompts and/or lower-compression fallback before giving up.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/agents.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/config.ts` if retry behavior needs configuration

Worker notes:
- keep retries bounded and explicit
- prefer preserving useful observations over chasing perfect compression
- if configuration is introduced, keep it simple and document it in the package README
title: Add a retry ladder for reflection with stricter prompts and lower-compression fallback
